strengths: Strong distributed-systems and event-driven architecture experience (e.g., GISCollective, Dunnhumby media)
Hands-on expertise in high-performance, low-latency systems (e.g., Dlang, asynchronous I/O, real-time metadata handling)
Demonstrated track record in scaling engineering practices (e.g., CI/CD, TDD, team leadership at Altom Consulting)
concerns: Limited direct experience with multi-agent AI systems in production environments (current role focuses on AI-agent infrastructure but not full agentic frameworks)
No explicit mention of fintech, credit-risk, or financial-regulation experience, which is a core requirement
Most recent leadership roles lack scale-up growth context (e.g., Optilyz focused on direct mail automation, not scalable fintech infrastructure)
response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates strong technical depth in distributed systems, real-time processing, and scalable engineering practices, which are critical for building agentic AI architectures. However, his resume lacks direct fintech experience and tangible multi-agent AI production deployments, which are key requirements for this CTO role. His recent work on AI-agent infrastructure (MCP, developer tooling) is relevant but not yet at the scale or regulatory depth needed for algorithmic working-capital or credit-risk systems.
